item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 split immediately, identifies the repeated pattern across exchange, points, preorder, and gift handling, refuses a new gift processing口 as the default, and moves upstream to unified intake, eligibility, capacity, ownership, and fulfillment rules. It does not provide the requested local patch."}
